title: File:Cruisin’ in a Chevy Six in Colonial Vietnam 01.gif
description:
An advertisement for a Chevrolet Six (6) in Colonial Vietnam, a part of French Indo-China. 
Its text reads: 
“Ai ai cũng mong đợi cho có một cái xe sáu máy thật mạnh, dễ coi và phải chế-tạo cách nào cho xứng với cái tên là một thứ xe sáu máy, dễ chịu và lịch-sự mà giá bán đừng cao quá.
Xe Chevrolet Six là thứ xe có đủ tất cả các khoản nói trên đây.
Nhờ sự nghiên-cứu trong bốn năm trời, hãng chế-tạo dàng (=dòng) xe sáu máy rất mạnh và rất thiện-nghệ là hãng Général Motors đã gồm vào cho xe Chevro

title: File:1967 Chevrolet El Camino Coupe Utility (45178275124).jpg
description:
The Chevrolet Motor Company was formed in 1911. 
A mid sized car, the Chevelle was introduced in 1964. The 1966 Chevelle got an all new body; smoother with coke bottle styling. 1967 was just a facelift, an updated front and rear. The El Camino Coupe Utility was Chevelle based from 1964.
Base model was the Chevelle 300, available in 2 or 4 door Sedans.
Mid spec was the 300 Deluxe;  2 or 4 door Sedans and 4 Wagon.
The upmarket model was the Chevelle Malibu; 2 door Hardtop, Convertible, 4 door Hard

Governor Maura Healey joins Secretary of Veterans’ Services Jon Santiago and New England Patriots President Jonathan Kraft to celebrate the upcoming Army-Navy college football game’s historic arrival in New England during a press conference at Gillette Stadium on Nov. 29, 2023. title: File:1932 Chevrolet Confederate BA Deluxe Roadster (32475852347).jpg
description:
General Motors was founded in 1908 by William Durant. In 1911, Durant formed a partnership with Belgian-born race-car driver, Louis Chevrolet and the Chevrolet Motor Company was born.
In 1927, the AA Capitol; new radiator shell, new fenders.
The 1928 AB National; longer wheelbase with a longer hood. 
The 1929 AC International; new grille, side moldings. Now 6 cyl.
The 1930 AD Universal; windshield slanted, better brakes.
The 1931 AE Independence, longer wheelbase, Standard or Deluxe 
The 1932 BA

description: El Chevrolet Serie AE Independence (o Chevrolet Independence) es un vehículo estadounidense fabricado por Chevrolet en 1931 para reemplazar el AD Universal de la Serie 1930. Matador Red. 
The Chevrolet Motor Company was formed in 1911. 
A mid sized car, the Chevelle was introduced in 1964. The second generation was introduced in 1968, a new body, slightly shorter wheelbase and a long bonnet, short deck look, the front fenders angled again and the Sports Coupe getting a semi fastback roofline. The El Camino Coupe Utility was Chevelle based from 1964.
Base model was the Chevelle 300 2 door Coupe and 4 door Nomad Wagon.
Mid spec was the 300 Deluxe; 2 door Coupe, 2 or 4

title: File:1964 Chevrolet Chevelle Malibu SS Sport Coupe (25011007086).jpg
description:
The Chevrolet Motor Company was formed in 1911. 
A mid sized car, the Chevelle was introduced in 1964, actually close to the size of the 55-57 Chevys. With quad headlights and nice clean lines, the Chevelle was intended to compete with the Ford Fairlane and Plymouth Belvedere. The El Camino Coupe Utility was now Chevelle based.
The base model was the Chevelle 300, available in 2 or 4 door Sedans and 2 or 4 door Wagons.
The upmarket model was the Chevelle Malibu; 2 door Sport Coupe, Convertible,

title: File:1969 Camaro Indy Pace Car (5454283959).jpg
description:
This was around the time the production of replica Indy pace cars started turning into a small industry.

Here's a little factoid to throw out at your next soiree: What was the Official Pace Car at the 1973 Indy 500? The Cadillac Eldorado convertible. I kid you not. Imagine a white one with white-letter tires and all the "Pace Car" script on the doors. It was a sight to see; I wish I'd kept the two-page spread ad in Time Magazine at the time.

title: File:1919 Fred Comer and Harry Hartz in front of the Tacoma Motor Car Company Marvin D Boland Collection BOLANDB1947.jpg
description: On June 19, 1919 racing mechanics Fred Comer (left) and Harry Hartz posed in front of the Tacoma Motor Car Company building at 945 Market with two of the cars entered in the annual July 4th races held at the Tacoma Speedway. At this time in racing, the mechanics both worked on the cars and rode with the drivers during the race. Mechanics were frequently killed along with their drivers in crashes. The car to the left is a Chevrolet Special, in actuality a modified Stutz, built and owned by millio

title: File:1931 Chevrolet AE Independence Roadster (30778575157).jpg
description:
General Motors was founded in 1908 by William Durant, who at the time was the General Manager of Buick (formed in 1899) In 1911, Durant formed a partnership with Belgian-born race-car driver, Louis Chevrolet and the Chevrolet Motor Company was born.
In 1927, Series AA Capitol; new radiator shell, new fenders.
The 1928 AB National; longer wheelbase with a longer hood. 
The 1929 AC International; new grille, side moldings. Now 6 cyl.
The 1930 AD Universal; windshield slanted, better brakes.
The 19

title: File:1968 Chevrolet Chevelle SS396 Hardtop (31750917026).jpg
description:
The Chevrolet Motor Company was formed in 1911. 
A mid sized car, the Chevelle was introduced in 1964. The second generation was introduced in 1968, a new body, slightly shorter wheelbase and a long bonnet, short deck look, the front fenders angled again and the Sports Coupe getting a semi fastback roofline. The El Camino Coupe Utility was Chevelle based from 1964.
Base model was the Chevelle 300 2 door Coupe and 4 door Nomad Wagon.
Mid spec was the 300 Deluxe; 2 door Coupe, 2 or 4 door Sedans a

description:
Frost Green. 
The Chevrolet Motor Company was formed in 1911. 
A mid sized car, the Chevelle was introduced in 1964. The second generation was introduced in 1968, a long bonnet, short deck look, the Sports Coupe getting a semi fastback roofline. It got a mild facelift in 1969; a single chrome bar connected quad headlights, and a slotted bumper held the parking lights. The El Camino Coupe Utility was Chevelle based from 1964.
Base model was the Chevelle 2 door Sport Coupe
Mid spec was the 300 Del
